dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The agent consistently adhered to architectural governance rules and constraints, demonstrating clear alignment with compliance requirements.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: Cause-effect relationships were identified at a surface level, but deeper systemic impacts and feedback loops were not thoroughly explored.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: Key trade-offs were recognized, though resolution strategies lacked comprehensive justification across competing architectural priorities.
